title: rhododendron × arbutifolium
intro: Rhododendron × arbutifolium, also known as the Labrador tea or eastern Labrador tea, is a deciduous shrub that belongs to the heath family (Ericaceae) and is native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Rhododendron × arbutifolium include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and act as an expectorant to relieve congestion. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
